title: Hercule Poirot #1: The Mysterious Affair at Styles
author: Agatha Christie
blurb2: This visual novel is only the second greatest work in the Poirot-adaptation canon. For while Public Domain Pulp always aspires to be the best, it simply can't beat James Coco's performance in Murder By Death. Great authentic accents all around in that film — especially Peter Sellers. One day the site will have visual novels for each of five detectives, plus In Cold Blood or something for Capote. That'll be a good collection.
